12 Best Games Like Super Bear Adventure on Mobile (2026)

Looking for games similar to Super Bear Adventure? Here are 12 best mobile games with open-world exploration, platforming, and charming characters.

June 13, 2026 Updated Jun 17, 2026 8 min read
Share:

Why Look for Games Like Super Bear Adventure?

Super Bear Adventure has captured the hearts of millions of mobile gamers with its charming open-world platforming, lovable characters, and surprisingly deep gameplay. The combination of exploration, collectible hunting, puzzle solving, and engaging boss fights creates an experience that is hard to find elsewhere on mobile.

Whether you have completed every mission, found every secret sticker, and earned every medal, or you simply want more games that offer a similar experience, this list will help you find your next mobile gaming obsession.

We have carefully selected games that share key qualities with Super Bear Adventure: open-world exploration, platforming mechanics, collectibles, charming art styles, and engaging single-player or multiplayer experiences. Each game on this list has been tested and reviewed for its similarity to SBA and overall quality.

1. Lego Brawls

What Makes It Similar

Lego Brawls brings the same kind of lighthearted, accessible action that makes Super Bear Adventure so enjoyable. The game features colorful environments, customizable characters, and multiplayer modes that let you play with friends.

Key Features

  • Extensive character customization with Lego parts
  • Multiple themed arenas based on popular Lego sets
  • Online multiplayer with up to eight players
  • Regular content updates with new themes and characters

Who Should Play It

If you love the character variety in Super Bear Adventure and enjoy the multiplayer aspect, Lego Brawls is an excellent choice. The building and customization options add a creative layer that SBA fans will appreciate.

Platform: Android, iOS | Price: Free with in-app purchases

2. Oceanhorn: Monster of Uncharted Seas

What Makes It Similar

Oceanhorn delivers an adventure experience that fans of Super Bear Adventure’s exploration will love. The game features an open world with multiple islands to discover, puzzles to solve, and enemies to defeat. Its top-down perspective differs from SBA, but the spirit of adventure and discovery is very much the same.

Key Features

  • Vast open world with multiple islands to explore
  • Zelda-inspired gameplay with puzzles and combat
  • Beautiful art style and atmospheric soundtrack
  • Deep story with memorable characters

Who Should Play It

If the lore of Baaren and the Kingdom of Earthkwak is what draws you to Super Bear Adventure, Oceanhorn’s rich narrative and world-building will feel right at home. The sense of discovering new locations and uncovering a grand story is comparable.

Platform: Android, iOS | Price: Premium (one-time purchase)

3. Raccoon Adventure: City Simulator 3D

What Makes It Similar

This is perhaps the most directly comparable game to Super Bear Adventure on mobile. You play as a raccoon exploring a 3D open world, collecting items, completing missions, and interacting with various characters. The animal protagonist and open-world platforming make it feel like a close cousin to SBA.

Key Features

  • 3D open-world exploration as a raccoon
  • Various missions and side activities
  • Character customization options
  • Multiple environments to explore

Who Should Play It

If you specifically enjoy the animal character aspect of Super Bear Adventure and want a similar open-world experience with a different protagonist, this game delivers exactly that. It captures the same sense of freedom and discovery.

Platform: Android, iOS | Price: Free with ads

4. Cat Quest II

What Makes It Similar

Cat Quest II combines adorable animal characters with satisfying action-RPG gameplay. The game features a charming world filled with dungeons, quests, and secrets, very much like the various worlds in Super Bear Adventure. The cooperative multiplayer mode also mirrors SBA’s co-op features.

Key Features

  • Co-op multiplayer support
  • Vast world with dungeons and hidden areas
  • RPG elements with gear and spells
  • Humor-filled story with pun-loving characters
  • Both cat and dog playable characters

Who Should Play It

Cat Quest II is perfect for SBA fans who want more depth in combat and character progression. The co-op mode makes it an excellent alternative for players who enjoy SBA’s multiplayer, and the world is packed with secret areas similar to what you find in Super Bear Adventure.

Platform: Android, iOS | Price: Premium (one-time purchase)

5. Paw Patrol: The Movie Adventure City Calls

What Makes It Similar

While targeted at a younger audience, Paw Patrol Adventure City Calls shares several qualities with Super Bear Adventure: 3D platforming, mission-based gameplay, character variety, and a family-friendly tone. The production values are high, and the gameplay is genuinely enjoyable regardless of age.

Key Features

  • 3D platforming with multiple playable characters
  • Each character has unique abilities
  • Story-driven missions
  • Colorful, polished environments

Who Should Play It

If you enjoy Super Bear Adventure specifically for its wholesome, family-friendly nature and want something similar for younger players, this is an excellent pick. The multiple character abilities add variety similar to SBA’s different skins and gameplay options.

Platform: Android, iOS, Console | Price: Premium

6. Sneaky Sasquatch

What Makes It Similar

Sneaky Sasquatch is often mentioned alongside Super Bear Adventure as one of the best open-world adventure games on mobile. You play as a sasquatch exploring a campground and its surrounding areas, completing various activities, and interacting with humans while trying not to get caught. The sense of freedom and discovery is very similar to SBA.

Key Features

  • Large open world with multiple regions
  • Hundreds of activities and side quests
  • Disguise mechanics for stealth gameplay
  • Regular updates with new content
  • Multiple vehicles and tools to use

Who Should Play It

If the open-world exploration and discovery aspect of Super Bear Adventure is what you love most, Sneaky Sasquatch offers an even larger world to explore with more diverse activities. The game continuously adds new content, much like SBA’s regular version updates.

Platform: iOS (Apple Arcade) | Price: Apple Arcade subscription

7. Sackboy: A Big Adventure (Mobile)

What Makes It Similar

Sackboy brings the beloved LittleBigPlanet franchise to mobile with a focus on platforming excellence. The game features creative level design, collectible hunting, and cooperative multiplayer, which are all core elements of the Super Bear Adventure experience.

Key Features

  • Precision platforming with creative mechanics
  • Collectibles hidden throughout every level
  • Cooperative multiplayer support
  • Imaginative art style using craft materials
  • Challenge levels for experienced players

Who Should Play It

If the platforming mechanics of Super Bear Adventure are your favorite aspect, Sackboy delivers tighter, more focused platforming challenges. The collectible system will appeal to players who enjoy hunting for every medal and sticker in SBA.

Platform: Multiple | Price: Premium

8. Bugsnax

What Makes It Similar

Bugsnax offers a unique adventure where you explore an island populated by creatures that are half-bug, half-snack. The exploration-focused gameplay, charming characters, and mystery-driven story share the same appeal as Super Bear Adventure’s world of Baaren.

Key Features

  • Unique creature-catching mechanics
  • Rich story with quirky characters
  • Open world with multiple biomes
  • Puzzle-solving elements
  • Multiple endings based on choices

Who Should Play It

If you are drawn to Super Bear Adventure’s unique world and characters, Bugsnax offers an equally original and charming world. The creature-catching aspect adds a collecting dimension similar to finding all characters and NPCs in SBA.

Platform: Multiple | Price: Premium

9. Oddmar

What Makes It Similar

Oddmar is a visually stunning platformer that combines hand-drawn art with tight gameplay mechanics. While it is more linear than Super Bear Adventure, the quality of platforming, the charming Viking protagonist, and the level of polish make it a must-play for SBA fans.

Key Features

  • Gorgeous hand-drawn graphics
  • Smooth, responsive platforming controls
  • Physics-based puzzles
  • Hidden secrets in every level
  • Boss battles with unique mechanics

Who Should Play It

For players who appreciate Super Bear Adventure’s visual charm and solid controls, Oddmar raises the bar with stunning visuals and precise gameplay. The hidden secrets throughout levels will appeal to players who love finding secret areas in SBA.

Platform: Android, iOS | Price: Free with in-app purchases

10. Genshin Impact (Casual Exploration Focus)

What Makes It Similar

While Genshin Impact is a much larger and more complex game, its open-world exploration shares a surprising amount of DNA with Super Bear Adventure. The joy of climbing mountains, discovering hidden chests, solving environmental puzzles, and exploring vast landscapes is very similar to the exploration experience in SBA’s various worlds.

Key Features

  • Massive open world with seven nations
  • Climbing, gliding, and swimming exploration mechanics
  • Hundreds of puzzles and hidden chests
  • Multiplayer co-op for up to four players
  • Regular updates with new regions and content

Who Should Play It

If Super Bear Adventure has you craving an even bigger world to explore, Genshin Impact delivers an enormous open world with similar exploration satisfaction. The co-op system also supports up to four players, just like SBA’s multiplayer. However, be aware that Genshin is significantly more complex and time-demanding.

Platform: Android, iOS, PC, Console | Price: Free with gacha mechanics

11. Elk’s Adventure

What Makes It Similar

Elk’s Adventure captures the simple joy of 3D platforming exploration that makes Super Bear Adventure special. Playing as an elk character, you navigate through forests, mountains, and villages, collecting items and completing quests. The family-friendly tone and accessible gameplay make it a natural recommendation for SBA fans.

Key Features

  • 3D open-world exploration
  • Animal protagonist with charming animations
  • Quest-based progression
  • Seasonal events and updates
  • Photo mode for capturing scenic views

Who Should Play It

If the wholesome animal adventure aspect of Super Bear Adventure resonates with you, Elk’s Adventure provides a similarly relaxing and enjoyable experience. The photo mode is a nice addition for players who love SBA’s beautiful environments.

Platform: Android, iOS | Price: Free with in-app purchases

12. Yooka-Laylee and the Impossible Lair

What Makes It Similar

Yooka-Laylee pays homage to classic 3D platformers, and the Impossible Lair entry brings exceptional 2D platforming combined with a 3D overworld. The overworld exploration feels very similar to navigating Super Bear Adventure’s hub areas, while the individual levels provide focused platforming challenges.

Key Features

  • Mix of 2D platforming levels and 3D overworld exploration
  • Overworld with secrets and alternate level variations
  • Tight, responsive controls
  • Collectible Tonics that modify gameplay
  • Challenging but fair difficulty curve

Who Should Play It

For SBA fans who want more structured platforming challenges alongside open-world exploration, Yooka-Laylee offers the best of both worlds. The overworld secrets and collectible system will keep completionists busy for hours.

Platform: Multiple | Price: Premium

Tips for Finding More Games Like SBA

What to Search For

When looking for games similar to Super Bear Adventure, use these search terms on your app store:

  • “3D platformer adventure”
  • “Open world animal game”
  • “Collectathon platformer”
  • “Exploration adventure mobile”
  • “Co-op platformer”

What Makes SBA Unique

While all the games on this list are excellent, it is worth noting what makes Super Bear Adventure truly special:

  • The combination of open-world exploration with accessible platforming is rare on mobile
  • The multiplayer system works seamlessly on mobile
  • The variety of worlds, from Turtletown to the Mole Mines, keeps the experience fresh
  • The game is completely free to play without aggressive monetization
  • The modding community adds even more value to an already generous game

Keep Coming Back to SBA

Even after exploring these alternatives, most players find themselves coming back to Super Bear Adventure. The game continues to receive updates with new content, and there is always more to discover. Make sure you have claimed all available redeem codes and explored every secret area before declaring yourself done with the game.

No matter which games you try from this list, Super Bear Adventure remains one of the best mobile platforming experiences available. These alternatives simply give you more options to enjoy when you need a break from Baaren’s adventures, and many of them will only deepen your appreciation for what makes SBA special.
